name: bupleurum chinense
title: best benefits of bupleurum chinense
description: Bupleurum chinense protects liver by exerting hepatoprotective properties, which refer to the plant's ability to shield and support liver function, thereby preventing or slowing damage to liver cells. This benefit is crucial because liver dysfunction can lead to conditions such as cirrhosis, liver failure, and even liver cancer, which can be life-threatening if left untreated. Bupleurum chinense is rich in bioactive constituents like saikosaponins, flavonoids, and triterpenoids, which ...
